description: Klassifikations- og E2E-matrix: Grundfos + Gabriel. Transskripter har mindst fem ord efter normalisering.

scenarios.transcript: [Operator]: We need the HMI overview with navigation tabs for alarms live trends and setpoint panel on the SCADA station with process synoptic and PLC linked gauges.
[UX]: Map the customer journey from awareness through onboarding daily use and renewal with touchpoints emotions pain points and opportunities for the new app experience.
[PM]: Document the commissioning workflow with start node decision diamonds for piping compatibility mounting power connection and end state in a clear flowchart.
[Product]: Present the Alpha GO circulator with LED ring around the face GO app panel beside it IE5 motor DN25 flanges and callouts for Bluetooth module housing.
[Analyst]: Build an executive dashboard with KPI tiles month over month chart funnel for LinkedIn and Facebook campaigns and CSV export to Excel for leadership review.
[PO]: Capture firmware requirements with Must Should Could Won priorities Modbus BACnet features alarm latency traceability IDs and status column for compliance tracking.
[Research]: Define persona Thomas installer age forty two needs quick manuals wiring diagrams frustrations with model numbers and motivation to finish jobs fast with reviews.
[Service]: Draw the service blueprint with customer actions frontstage calls backstage warehouse ERP pick list courier API and physical evidence like quote PDF and certificate.
[Architect]: Compare three controller options on integration cost maintenance and deployment with weighted scoring matrix and competitive notes for the utility tender.
[Design]: Document tokens navy hex secondary blue spacing eight pixel grid button states hover disabled loading and component anatomy in the design system specification.
[PMO]: Show roadmap milestones prototype March field test April production June regulatory risk in May steering quarterly budget approved kanban decisions for steering committee.
[Chair]: Thanks everyone for joining today we will follow up next week on parking logistics and room booking.
